list.name: Changes
list.comment: saving - Implemented client utils in raft test package

project.component: { "keyToString": { "JUnit.DiscoveryServiceTest$EdgeCaseTests.executor": "Run", "JUnit.DiscoveryServiceTest$GetMemberTests.getMember_shouldReturnDeserializedNodeConfig.executor": "Run", "JUnit.DiscoveryServiceTest$GetMembersTests.getMembers_shouldHandleIOException.executor": "Run", "JUnit.DiscoveryServiceTest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVMapSnapshotterTest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVMapTest and 2 more.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_afterRestoreFromSnapshotAndWAL_returnsCorrectResults.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_afterRestoreFromSnapshot_returnsCorrectResults.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_afterRestoreFromWALWithDeletes_returnsCorrectResults.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_afterRestoreFromWAL_returnsCorrectResults.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_afterRestoreWithDeletes_returnsCorrectResults.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_afterRestoreWithEmptyKey_handlesCorrectly.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_afterRestoreWithKeyDeletedInWAL_keyNotFound.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_afterRestoreWithOverlappingKeys_returnsCorrectResults.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_afterRestoreWithReaddedKey_keyFound.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_emptySnapshot_returnsEmptyList.executor": "Run", "JUnit.KVStoreTest.search_largeDatasetAfterRestore_returnsCorrectResults.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionNewTest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionNewTest.testBootstrapConcludes_withFreshNodes.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.brokerConnectionFailure_incrementsVoteCount_duringElection.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.brokerWithHigherLogTerm_initiatesOwnElection_onStaleVoteRequest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.completeElectionCycle_fromInitiationToCompletion_with3Nodes.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.electionCompletes_withMultipleBrokerConnectionFailures.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.electionSucceeds_despiteInitialVoteDenial.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.multipleElections_withIncreasingTerms.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.nodeReceivingVoteRequest_withGreaterTermLowerLogId_initiatesElectionWithoutDuplicate.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.testBootstrapConcludes_withFreshNodes.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LeaderElectionTest.voteResponseWithMismatchedTerm_isIgnored_duringElection.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftCommandHandlerNewTest.brokerState_returnsRedirectToController.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftCommandHandlerNewTest.deleteCommand_candidateState_returnsInElectionError.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftCommandHandlerNewTest.deleteCommand_minimumMajority_completesAtThreshold.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftCommandHandlerNewTest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftCommandHandlerNewTest.handleCommand_fastNodes_majorityReached.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftCommandHandlerNewTest.handleCommand_slowNodes_majorityReachedAfterDelay.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftCommandHandlerTest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftCommandHandlerTest.handleCommand_fastNodes_majorityReached.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftCommandHandlerTest.handleCommand_largeValue_processesCorrectly.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftControllerTest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftControllerTest.findingNextLog_returnsCorrectNextLog.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftControllerTest.followerUpToDate_sameLogIdAndTerm_returnsMostRecentLog.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftControllerTest.freshFollower_bothNodesEmpty_returnsEmptyCommand.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftControllerTest.freshFollower_noSnapshot_returnsFirstLog.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftControllerTest.freshFollower_withSnapshot_returnsSnapshot.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftControllerTest.largeSnapshot.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftControllerTest.requestLogIdBeforeFirstLog_withSnapshot_returnsSnapshot.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RaftControllerTest.sameLogIdDifferentTerm_returnsError.executor": "Run", "JUnit.RestorerTest and 1 more.executor": "Run", "JUnit.TrieTest$AddMethodTests.executor": "Run", "JUnit.TrieTest$AddMethodTests.shouldHandleCaseSensitivity.executor": "Run", "JUnit.TrieTest$ConstructorTests.executor": "Run", "JUnit.TrieTest$EdgeCaseTests.executor": "Run", "JUnit.TrieTest$GetCharacterMethodTests.executor": "Run", "JUnit.TrieTest$IntegrationTests.executor": "Run", "JUnit.TrieTest$RemoveMethodTests.executor": "Run", "JUnit.TrieTest$SearchMethodTests.executor": "Run", "JUnit.TrieTest.executor": "Run", "JUnit.raft in server.executor": "Run", "JUnit.server in server.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "feature/node-discovery", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/ADMIN/MyProjects/kvstore", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.lookFeel", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary: saving - Handling broker disconnect during election

changelist.name: Changes
changelist.comment: saving - Handling broker disconnect during election

task.summary: Added broker failure tests within LeaderElectionTest

Renamed NodeState to NodeRole ; Created RedirectMessage and RegisterMessage ; Created NodeConfig ; Implemented RegisterMessage on connect in RaftBrokerClient ; Created RegisterMessage handler in RaftManager and added support for new NodeConfig class ; Created RaftServer class merging RaftBrokerServerHandler and RaftCommandHandler
Renamed raft.handlers and raft.messages packages to raft.handler and raft.message ; Renamed BaseMessage to Message
saving - Implemented client utils in raft test package

MESSAGE.value: saving - Handling broker disconnect during election
Added broker failure tests within LeaderElectionTest

Renamed NodeState to NodeRole ; Created RedirectMessage and RegisterMessage ; Created NodeConfig ; Implemented RegisterMessage on connect in RaftBrokerClient ; Created RegisterMessage handler in RaftManager and added support for new NodeConfig class ; Created RaftServer class merging RaftBrokerServerHandler and RaftCommandHandler
Renamed raft.handlers and raft.messages packages to raft.handler and raft.message ; Renamed BaseMessage to Message
saving - Implemented client utils in raft test package

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: saving - Implemented client utils in raft test package
